key_decisions: Measure low-altitude camera passes separately from high-altitude passes because overdraw and fill-rate likely change dramatically.
Review fullscreen postprocess passes before chasing mesh draw-count reductions.
Keep texture fetch/decode async, but treat the actual render pass chain as serial.
parallel_tasks: analyze capability limits while reviewing the pass graph
parse performance logs while drafting a feature-cut order
prepare regression checks in parallel with bottleneck review
risks: Low-altitude flight may shift the bottleneck from vertex work to fill-rate and overdraw.
Three fullscreen passes may dominate cost on mid-range Android.
Without capture data, recommendations remain partly assumption-based until differential measurements are gathered.
next_steps: toggle postprocess passes one at a time and measure frame-time deltas
cap DPR before cutting terrain mesh fidelity
sort by framebuffer and reduce unnecessary target switches
collect timer-query or controlled differential timing data
